artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a high-backed swivel office throne, its worn vinyl cushions and chrome levers rendered as regalia, bathed in a faint cyan arcane halo as if requisitioned by destiny. It sits dead-center, slightly low and imposing, in an empty fluorescent corridor of blank cabinets. Tall reverent framing, ivory highlights bleeding into cold shadow. Rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: The Ergonomically Approved Chair of Power
text:
The player currently seated lowest at the table (slouch, recline, or sit on the floor — the auditor judges) is the City Manager. Whenever the City Manager rolls a die or flips a coin, you draw a card.
At the beginning of your upkeep, if YOU are the City Manager, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control and gain 2 life. Lumbar support is power.
flavorText: Requisitioned in 1991. Still under warranty. The warranty is also permanent.
